name: gcx-vector-protocol
description: The Vector Protocol: A Zero-Context Orchestrator for Gemini CLI. Leverages subagent swarms and fractal file systems for autonomous, long-running task execution.

commands.description: Strategy Orchestrator. Iteratively develops a tactical roadmap via the Ralph Wiggum protocol with Subagent Isolation.
Execution Orchestrator. Autonomously implements and verifies the roadmap via the Ralph Wiggum protocol with Subagent Isolation.

skills.name: vector-protocol
skills.description: Core procedural skill for the Vector Protocol. Activates the 'Zero-Context Orchestrator' and 'Ralph Wiggum' verification loops. Use this when the user executes `/vector:plan` or `/vector:work`.
